---
title: '"Disrupting Philanthropy? A Reality Check for Digital Crowdfunding" published in *Journal of Philanthropy*'
date: "2025-11-11"
categories: [publication]
---

My article ["Disrupting Philanthropy? A Reality Check for Digital Crowdfunding,"](https://doi.org/10.1002/nvsm.70041) with Nora Kenworthy, Erik Schneiderhan, and Jeremy Snyder, has been published in the *Journal of Philanthropy*. It is the lead article in a [Dialogues special issue](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/toc/10.1002/(ISSN)3064-7878.evolution-of-traditional) on crowdfunding.
